description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a hip roof covered in dark gray shingles. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with a section of tan stone cladding near the front entrance, adding visual interest. The house features a covered front porch supported by two cylindrical columns, and a set of steps leads up to the main entryway. Windows are present on the front and side facades, with a large window adjacent to the entry and smaller windows on the sides. The structure sits on a slightly raised foundation with a paved walkway and porch area. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, light gray walls, stone accent, and a covered front porch supported by columns. The entryway is accessible via steps and features a large window beside the door.
description_view_0: Rear and side view showing the hip roof, plain light gray wall, and part of the covered porch with columns.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway with steps, stone accent wall, large window, and covered porch supported by two columns.
description_view_2: Opposite rear and side view showing the hip roof, plain wall, and the side of the porch with one visible column.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the hip roof, plain light gray wall, and a glimpse of the porch and entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered porch, two cylindrical columns, and a stone accent wall.
